'''âg-r-f-sh''' ('''kagarfeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yurk|yurk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-r-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yurk|yurk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-r-f-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kagarfeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigarfeshoko|thigarfeshoko]] || [[word:jigarfeshoko|jigarfeshoko]] || [[word:shigarfeshoko|shigarfeshoko]] || [[word:kigarfeshoko|kigarfeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugarfeshoko|thuthugarfeshoko]] || [[word:jujugarfeshoko|jujugarfeshoko]] || [[word:shushugarfeshoko|shushugarfeshoko]] || [[word:kukugarfeshoko|kukugarfeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thugarfeshoko|thugarfeshoko]] || [[word:jugarfeshoko|jugarfeshoko]] || [[word:shugarfeshoko|shugarfeshoko]] || [[word:kugarfeshoko|kugarfeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thugarfeshoko|thugarfeshoko]] || [[word:jugarfeshoko|jugarfeshoko]] || [[word:shugarfeshoko|shugarfeshoko]] || [[word:kugarfeshoko|kugarfeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothogarfeshoko|thothogarfeshoko]] || [[word:jojogarfeshoko|jojogarfeshoko]] || [[word:shoshogarfeshoko|shoshogarfeshoko]] || [[word:kokogarfeshoko|kokogarfeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thogarfeshoko|thogarfeshoko]] || [[word:jogarfeshoko|jogarfeshoko]] || [[word:shogarfeshoko|shogarfeshoko]] || [[word:kogarfeshoko|kogarfeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thogarfeshoko|thogarfeshoko]] || [[word:jogarfeshoko|jogarfeshoko]] || [[word:shogarfeshoko|shogarfeshoko]] || [[word:kogarfeshoko|kogarfeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgarfeshoko|thĂŠgarfeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠgarfeshoko|jĂŠgarfeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠgarfeshoko|shĂŠgarfeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠgarfeshoko|kĂŠgarfeshoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thagarfeshoko|thagarfeshoko]] || [[word:jagarfeshoko|jagarfeshoko]] || [[word:shagarfeshoko|shagarfeshoko]] || [[word:kagarfeshoko|kagarfeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thagarfeshoko|thagarfeshoko]] || [[word:jagarfeshoko|jagarfeshoko]] || [[word:shagarfeshoko|shagarfeshoko]] || [[word:kagarfeshoko|kagarfeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
